evidence.claim: Owned offline-online evaluation harness with 600GB index footprint and 15-minute refresh
evidence.source_text: Most recently, I owned the offline-online evaluation harness — NDCG/MRR/recall calibrated to live A/B metrics, with an index footprint of ~600GB and incremental refresh every 15 min.

evidence.claim: Developed calibration approach for recommendation metrics that held up for 18 months
evidence.source_text: After three iterations we landed on a calibration approach using simulated A/B tests that has held up over the last 18 months.

evidence.claim: Curated 200K high-quality preference pairs for model training
evidence.source_text: Built the data curation pipeline that generated 200K high-quality preference pairs from recruiter labels

evidence.claim: Achieved sub-200ms p95 latency for LLM deployment
evidence.source_text: Deployed the model via BentoML on Kubernetes with sub-200ms p95 latency

evidence.claim: Reduced inference cost from $0.04 to under $0.001
evidence.source_text: Cost per inference dropped from $0.04 with GPT-3.5-fallback to under $0.001.

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes TensorFlow, OpenSearch, FAISS, PEFT, LangChain, Weaviate, PyTorch, LlamaIndex
evidence.source_text: Skills: TensorFlow (expert, 56mo, 9 endorsements); OpenSearch (expert, 92mo, 31 endorsements); FAISS (advanced, 42mo, 41 endorsements); PEFT (expert, 75mo, 10 endorsements); LangChain (expert, 63mo, 55 endorsements); Weaviate (expert, 60mo, 29 endorsements); PyTorch (advanced, 39mo, 49 endorsements); LlamaIndex (expert, 67mo, 39 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Experience with fine-tuning LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B using LoRA/QLoRA
evidence.source_text: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B variants using LoRA and QLoRA

evidence.claim: Experience deploying models via BentoML on Kubernetes
evidence.source_text: Deployed the model via BentoML on Kubernetes

evidence.claim: Experience with end-to-end ranking pipeline architecture
evidence.source_text: Owned the end-to-end ranking pipeline at a recommendations-heavy consumer product: candidate sourcing → embedding generation (using a fine-tuned BGE-large) → Pinecone retrieval → learning-to-rank re-scoring (XGBoost) → behavioral-signal integration.

evidence.claim: Believes ranking problems are solved by feature engineering and rigorous eval over model size
evidence.source_text: I believe most ranking problems are solved by careful feature engineering and rigorous eval, not by bigger models.

evidence.claim: Values understanding tradeoffs in both early-stage and large-scale environments
evidence.source_text: I've shipped systems in both early-stage product companies and at larger scale, and I've spent enough time on both that I know which tradeoffs apply where.
Education: Ph.D in Artificial Intelligence at IIT Delhi (2014)
